US: Scenario 1: Notification for Autoflow or Standard Program Ending (UC1.1)
AC: An "Active" client has an assigned Autoflow or Program with no follow-up items after the current phase
Step:
1. Assign an Autoflow or Program to an Active client
2. Ensure no follow-up workouts, programs, studio programs, or Autoflows are scheduled after the current phase
3. Wait until 7 days before the last scheduled workout
4. Ensure the time is 9:00 AM in the Coach's configured timezone
Title: Autoflow or Program ending with 7-day notification
Expectation:
- SHOULD send an In-App Notification to the Coach Web and App
- SHOULD display message: "{Client Name}'s program and last workout ends next week ({mmm dd}). Check to assign more workouts."

US: Scenario 2: Notification for Individual Workouts (7-Day Warning) (UC1.3)
AC: An "Active" client has an individually assigned workout or On-Demand workout with no follow-up items
Step:
1. Assign an individual workout or On-Demand workout to an Active client
2. Ensure no follow-up items are scheduled after this workout
3. Wait until 7 days before the last workout
4. Ensure the time is 9:00 AM in the Coach's configured timezone
Title: Individual or On-Demand workout with 7-day notification
Expectation:
- SHOULD send an In-App Notification to the Coach Web and App
- SHOULD display message: "{Client Name}'s last workout is in 7 days ({mmm dd}). Check to assign more workouts."

US: Scenario 3: Notification for Individual Workouts or Studio Programs (3-Day Warning) (UC1.2)
AC: An "Active" client has an assigned individual workout with notification enabled
Step:
1. Assign an individual workout to an Active client
2. Ensure notification is enabled (default)
3. Ensure no follow-up items are scheduled after this workout
4. Wait until 3 days before the last workout
5. Ensure the time is 9:00 AM in the Coach's configured timezone
Title: Individual workout with 3-day notification
Expectation:
- SHOULD send an In-App Notification to the Coach Web and App
- SHOULD display message: "{Client Name}'s last workout is in 3 days ({mmm dd}). Check to assign more workouts."

AC: An "Active" client has a client-added workout with notification enabled
Step:
1. Add a client-added workout for an Active client
2. Ensure notification is enabled (default)
3. Ensure no follow-up items are scheduled after this workout
4. Wait until 3 days before the last workout
5. Ensure the time is 9:00 AM in the Coach's configured timezone
Title: Client-added workout with 3-day notification
Expectation:
- SHOULD send an In-App Notification to the Coach Web and App
- SHOULD display message: "{Client Name}'s last workout is in 3 days ({mmm dd}). Check to assign more workouts."

AC: An "Active" client has a Studio Program with notification enabled
Step:
1. Assign a Studio Program to an Active client
2. Ensure notification is enabled (default)
3. Ensure no follow-up items are scheduled after this program
4. Wait until 3 days before the last workout
5. Ensure the time is 9:00 AM in the Coach's configured timezone
Title: Studio Program with 3-day notification
Expectation:
- SHOULD send an In-App Notification to the Coach Web and App
- SHOULD display message: "{Client Name}'s current studio program and last workout ends in 3 days ({mmm dd})."

AC: A coach has received a "Workout phase ends" notification
Step:
1. Receive a "Workout phase ends" notification as a coach
2. Click on the notification in the Web or App
Title: Coach clicks notification on Web or App
Expectation:
- SHOULD open the client's training calendar
- SHOULD focus on the specific week containing the last workout

AC: The last day contains both an Individual Workout AND a Program/Autoflow workout
Step:
1. Assign both an Individual Workout and a Program/Autoflow workout to the same last day
2. Wait until the trigger date approaches
Title: Last day with mixed Individual and Program content
Expectation: - SHOULD trigger only the 7-day notification logic (UC1.1)

Step: Last day with mixed Individual and Program content
Title: - SHOULD suppress the 3-day notification usually sent for individual workouts

US: Scenario 6: Last Day Content Type Conflict (Case 6)
AC: The last scheduled day contains mixed types: On-Demand workout AND Individual assigned workout AND Studio Program workout
Title: Individual assigned workout
Expectation: and Studio Program workout on the same last day
Priority: Last day with On-Demand and Individual and Studio Program
column8: - SHOULD use the Individual/On-Demand workout message format (not the Studio Program format)

AC: A client has a Program ending on a specific date and a separate individual workout scheduled shortly after
Step:
1. Assign a Program to a client ending on Nov 15
2. Schedule a separate individual workout on Nov 17
Title: Program with gap and later individual workout
Expectation:
- SHOULD ignore the Program end date
- SHOULD calculate the trigger based on the final individual workout (Nov 17)
- SHOULD send the notification 3 days prior to the final workout (Nov 14)

AC: The last workout in a phase is set to "Hidden" from the client
Step:
1. Assign a workout to a client
2. Set the last workout to "Hidden" from the client
3. Wait until the notification trigger date
Title: Last workout is hidden from client
Expectation:
- SHOULD include this hidden workout in the count
- SHOULD trigger the notification based on the date of the hidden workout

US: Scenario 9: Coach Settings and Timezones (US2 & Case 2)
AC: The coach changes their timezone setting to a time that has already passed 9:00 AM for the current day
Step:
1. Set a notification trigger for the current day at 9:00 AM
2. Change the coach's timezone to a time that has already passed 9:00 AM
Title: Coach changes timezone after 9:00 AM
Expectation: - SHOULD not resend the notification for the current day

Title: - SHOULD schedule the notification for the following days based on the new timezone

AC: The coach has toggled "Client's workout phase ends" to OFF in Notification Settings
Step:
1. Assign a workout phase ending to a client
2. Toggle "Client's workout phase ends" to OFF in Notification Settings
3. Wait until the trigger date
Title: Notification setting is OFF
Expectation: - SHOULD not send any In-app or Push notifications

AC: A client status is "Archived" and their workout phase is ending
Step:
1. Assign a workout phase to a client
2. Change the client status to "Archived"
3. Wait until the trigger date
Title: Client status is Archived

AC: A client status is "Pending" and their workout phase is ending
Step:
1. Assign a workout phase to a client
2. Change the client status to "Pending"
3. Wait until the trigger date
Title: Client status is Pending
